texts.sentence: Wow — the glow squid shines with a beautiful blue light!
texts.sentenceTranslation: 哇——发光鱿鱼发出美丽的蓝色光芒！

texts.sentence: An allay collects items and dances to music.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 悦灵会收集物品并随着音乐跳舞。

texts.sentence: A mule is born when you breed a horse with a donkey.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 骡子是通过马和驴繁殖而来的。

texts.sentence: A plains farmer is near the village.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只平原农民在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: A donkey can carry a chest full of your items.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 驴可以携带装满物品的箱子。

texts.sentence: A brown trader llama is near the village.
texts.phraseTranslation: 一只友好的棕色商人羊驼
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只棕色商人羊驼在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: Squid swim in rivers and oceans and drop ink sacs.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 鱿鱼在河流和海洋中游泳，会掉落墨囊。

texts.sentence: An armadillo rolls into a ball when it is scared.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 当犰狳害怕时，它会卷成一个球。

texts.sentence: Bats hang upside down in dark caves.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 蝙蝠倒挂在黑暗的洞穴中。

texts.phrase: a friendly wandering trader je1 be1
texts.sentence: The wandering trader appeared near my base with two llamas.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 流浪商人带着两头羊驼出现在我的基地附近。

texts.sentence: I see a cow.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 我看见牛。

texts.sentence: A white horse is near the village.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只白色马在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: A nitwit refusing is near the village.
texts.phraseTranslation: 一只友好的傻子村民拒绝交易
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只傻子村民拒绝交易在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: Sea turtles lay their eggs on the beach.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 海龟在海滩上产卵。

texts.sentence: I see a chicken.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 我看见鸡。

texts.sentence: A tadpole grows into a frog over time.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 蝌蚪随着时间长大变成青蛙。

texts.sentence: A clownfish is near the village.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只小丑鱼在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: Goats live on mountains and can knock you off a cliff!
texts.sentenceTranslation: 山羊生活在山上，还会把你顶下悬崖！

texts.sentence: Ocelots are wild cats that live in the jungle.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 豹猫是生活在丛林里的野猫。

texts.sentence: Don't attack zombified piglins — they will all attack you together!
texts.sentenceTranslation: 不要攻击僵尸猪灵——它们会一起反击你！

texts.sentence: A pufferfish small is near the village.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只河豚小型在村庄附近。

texts.phrase: a friendly polar bear je2 be2
texts.sentence: A polar bear is calm alone but angry when near its cub.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 北极熊单独时很平静，但在幼崽附近时会变得愤怒。

texts.sentence: Pandas love eating bamboo in the jungle.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 熊猫喜欢在丛林里吃竹子。

texts.sentence: Ride a strider across lava lakes in the Nether.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 骑着炽足兽穿越下界的岩浆湖。

texts.sentence: A skeleton horse is near the village.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只骷髅马在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: Give piglins gold and they will trade items with you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 给猪灵金子，它们会与你交易物品。

texts.sentence: Hoglins are dangerous pig-like creatures in the Nether.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 疣猪兽是下界中危险的猪形生物。

texts.phrase: a friendly iron golem je2 be2
texts.sentence: The iron golem protects villagers from monsters.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 铁傀儡保护村民免受怪物袭击。

texts.sentence: A fox sleeps during the day and hunts at night.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 狐狸白天睡觉，晚上狩猎。

texts.sentence: Tame a wolf with bones and it will fight for you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 用骨头驯服狼，它会为你而战。

texts.sentence: Spiders can climb up walls and jump at you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 蜘蛛能爬墙并向你跳跃。

texts.phrase: a friendly piglin brute je1 be1
texts.sentence: The piglin brute always attacks you — gold won't help!
texts.sentenceTranslation: 猪灵蛮兵会一直攻击你——给金子也没用！

texts.sentence: Silverfish hide inside stone blocks near the stronghold.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 蠹鱼藏在要塞附近的石块内。

texts.sentence: Husks spawn in the desert and do not burn in the sun.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 尸壳在沙漠生成，不会在阳光下燃烧。

texts.sentence: Pillagers carry crossbows and attack villages.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 掠夺者手持弩，攻击村庄。

texts.phrase: a friendly cave spider je3 be3
texts.sentence: Cave spiders are smaller than normal spiders but they poison you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 洞穴蜘蛛比普通蜘蛛小，但会使你中毒。

texts.sentence: Big slimes split into smaller slimes when you hit them.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 大的史莱姆被击中后会分裂成更小的史莱姆。

texts.sentence: A ravager is a huge beast that destroys crops in raids.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 劫掠兽是巨大野兽，在袭击中摧毁庄稼。

texts.sentence: A stray is a skeleton that lives in cold biomes.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 流浪者是生活在寒冷生物群系的骷髅。

texts.sentence: Drowned zombies live underwater and can throw tridents.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 溺尸生活在水下，能投掷三叉戟。

texts.sentence: A hoglin that enters the Overworld becomes a zoglin.
texts.phraseTranslation: 一只友好的僵尸疣猪兽
texts.sentenceTranslation: 疣猪兽进入主世界后会变成僵尸疣猪兽。

texts.phrase: a friendly magma cube je2 be2
texts.sentence: Magma cubes bounce around and live in the Nether.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 岩浆怪在下界跳跃生活。

texts.sentence: Phantoms attack players who have not slept for many days.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 幻翼攻击那些多日未睡的玩家。

texts.sentence: Vex ghosts can fly through walls and attack you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 恼鬼幽灵可以穿墙飞行并攻击你。

texts.sentence: Guardians protect the ocean monument with laser beams.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 守卫者用激光束保护海洋神殿。

texts.sentence: The witch throws bad potions at you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 女巫朝你扔坏药水。

texts.sentence: Zombies come out at night and burn in the sunlight.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 僵尸在夜晚出现，在阳光下会燃烧。

texts.sentence: Build a Wither yourself if you want a great challenge.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 如果你想要一个巨大的挑战，就自己召唤一个凋灵。

texts.sentence: The creeper is near.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 苦力怕在附近。

texts.sentence: The bogged is a skeleton that shoots poisonous arrows.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 泥沼骷髅是一种发射毒箭的骷髅。

texts.phrase: a friendly wither skeleton je4 be3
texts.sentence: Wither skeletons live in nether fortresses and are very dangerous.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 凋灵骷髅生活在下界要塞，非常危险。

texts.sentence: A shulker hides in its shell and shoots bullets at you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 潜影贝藏在它的壳里，并向你发射子弹。

texts.sentence: Blazes fly and shoot fireballs at you.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 烈焰人会飞行并向你发射火球。

texts.sentence: A ghast floats in the Nether and fires giant fireballs.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 恶魂漂浮在下界，并发射巨大的火球。

texts.sentence: The creaking only moves when you are not looking at it.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 嘎吱怪只在你不看它的时候才会移动。

texts.sentence: The elder guardian is the boss of the ocean monument.
texts.phraseTranslation: 一只友好的远古守卫者
texts.sentenceTranslation: 远古守卫者是海洋神殿的首领。

texts.sentenceTranslation: 一只左手骷髅在村庄附近。

texts.sentence: The Nether is a hot, dark place full of dangerous mobs.
texts.sentenceTranslation: 下界是一个炎热、黑暗且充满危险怪物的地方。
